name: usage
description: Langfuse telemetry logger for gw execution observability with vault-backed credentials and silent local fallback mode.
capability_summary: Records every gw execution to Langfuse including latency and success status; when credentials are missing it runs local-only without failing commands.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Service namespace for the execution event (for example gmail, drive, news).

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Specific command/action name (for example gmail.send, news.search).

commands.name: log
commands.description: Persist one structured execution event into Langfuse.
